section.heading: Congressional declaration of purpose
section.chapeau: The purposes of this chapter are to—

paragraph.content: require strict financial and program accounting by advisory committees of the Department of Agriculture;
assure balance and objectivity in the membership of such advisory committees; and
prevent the formation or continuation of unnecessary advisory committees by the Department of Agriculture.

note.heading: Effective Date of 1981 Amendment
note.p: Amendment by Pub. L. 97–98 effective Dec. 22, 1981, see section 1801 of Pub. L. 97–98, set out as an Effective Date note under section 4301 of this title.

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective Oct. 1, 1977, see section 1901 of Pub. L. 95–113, set out as an Effective Date of 1977 Amendment note under section 1307 of this title.

note.heading: Soybean Research Advisory Institute
note.p: Pub. L. 97–98, title XIV, § 1446, Dec. 22, 1981, 95 Stat. 1327, provided for the establishment of a Soybean Research Advisory Institute for the purpose of preparing and submitting to Senate Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry and House Committee on Agriculture, not later than Mar. 1, 1983, a comprehensive report, with appropriate recommendations, on the findings of the Institute regarding research on soybean production and utilization, prior to repeal by Pub. L. 99–198, title XIV, § 1434, Dec. 23, 1985, 99 Stat. 1557.
